response.original_title: ((Add~More~Cabins~Reservations)) How do I add a extra room or cabin to my Cunard Cruise? The Ultimate Guide
response.overview: You can add another room or a guest to an existing Cunard cruise booking by contacting Cunard directly at +1-866-829-1280(US) or +44-204-586-5316(UK) or through a travel agent, subject to availability and ship capacity. For additional guests, +1-866-829-1280(US) the cabin must have space, and the request is best handled through the "My Cunard" portal or by calling to check capacity. Possible if the cabin has capacity and the ship is not at full capacity. Call +1-866-829-1280(US) or your agent. If you want to reserve multiple rooms close together, calling 1-866-(+1-866-829-1280) CRUISES is recommended. To add a room or guest to an existing Cunard cruise, call Cunard directly at +1-866-829-1280 (US/UK/Canada) or contact your travel agent to check availability, as this cannot be done solely online. Contact Cunard at 1-866-829-1280(US) or your travel agent immediately, as early booking helps ensure cabins are nearby.
response.title: ((Add~More~Cabins~Reservations)) How do I add a extra room or cabin to my Cunard Cruise? The Ultimate Guide
